name: zsnoop-mcp
description: ZFS snapshot exploration and recovery over SSH through the zsnoop-mcp server.

settings.name: Zsnoop Config
settings.description: Optional path to hosts.toml. If unset, zsnoop-mcp uses $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/zsnoop-mcp/hosts.toml or ~/.config/zsnoop-mcp/hosts.toml.

settings.name: Zsnoop Log Level
settings.description: Optional zsnoop-mcp stderr log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.
